heading: Oversight responsibility of Director
label: 6105 Oversight responsibility of Director
text: The Director shall have oversight responsibility for the exercise of all authorities and responsibilities in this chapter not specifically assigned to the Director.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6105, , , , related to authorization of appropriations to carry out this chapter, prior to repeal by . See .Pub. L. 97–25896 Stat. 1002section 5 of Pub. L. 98–169section 6106 of this titleSept. 13, 1982
